description: Every is an AI-native operations platform for freelancers, consultants, agencies, and other client-service businesses. It combines CRM, proposals, invoicing, payments, booking, and related workflows with an AI assistant.
summary: Every exposes a documented HTTP API surface via an OpenAPI document and two MCP surfaces: an OAuth-protected Admin MCP at `https://admin-mcp.every.ai/` plus a per-business Client MCP described in docs.
